who: operations managers in home services companies processing 5–15 job completion reports/day
offer: For operations managers in home services companies processing 5–15 job completion reports/day, inefficient tracking causes delayed reporting. We automate report compilation instead of manual compilation of reports from various sources.
problem: inefficient tracking of job completion leads to delayed reporting and operational inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for operations managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to operations managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for operations managers
try_it: Let users try manual report entry and daily summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
